title: Dark Nuns
tmdbOverview: Desperation drives two nuns to perform an exorcism no nun should attempt. With a possessed child at the mercy of evil and the opposition of the Catholic Church, they take on the dangerous forbidden rituals themselves, putting their immortal souls in grave danger. They must confront the terrifying cost of their sacrilegious actions, but one goal remains: the boy must be saved at all costs.
synopsis: Dark Nuns is a 2025 horror, mystery and thriller film from South Korea. It carries a 6.2 rating on TMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a +13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
